branch.branch_summary: Open the next implementation task only after a runtime-backed direction review turns v8.0 Externalized Organization Runtime into a bounded task with external source-of-truth and approval boundaries.

tree_answer.where_are_we: The runtime is between v7.8 and the next concrete branch.
tree_answer.why_this_branch: Prepare v8.0 Externalized Organization Runtime: define how external actors, tools, providers, and references become governed runtime resources with source-of-truth, permission, freshness, availability, approval, and not-proven boundaries.
tree_answer.what_branch_comes_next: Run a runtime-backed direction review before opening the next implementation task: Open the next implementation task only after a runtime-backed direction review turns v8.0 Externalized Organization Runtime into a bounded task with external source-of-truth and approval boundaries.
